title: rosa viscaria var. veridica
intro: Rosa viscaria var. veridica, also known as the alpine rose or alpenrose, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Rosa viscaria var. veridica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
